description.value: Cost: 1 Effect: Draw a weapon or stow it in its sheath/holster. Can draw/stow ONE weapon as a [Free] action once per turn as part of movement. Drawing two weapons requires Quick Draw feat or two separate actions. Doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks

system.effect: Draw a weapon or stow it in its sheath/holster. Can draw/stow ONE weapon as a [Free] action once per turn as part of movement. Drawing two weapons requires Quick Draw feat or two separate actions. Doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks
